# DatePicker

Pairs a typed date field with a calendar popover.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/date-picker
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="date-picker" example={0} code={`<EventDatePicker />`} />

```tsx
<EventDatePicker />
```

<ComponentPreview slug="date-picker" example={1} code={`<ReportRangePicker />`} />

```tsx
<ReportRangePicker />
```

## Props

### `<DatePicker.Base>`

| Prop            | Type        | Required | Default | Description                                          |
| --------------- | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `locale`        | `string`    | No       | -       | BCP-47 locale for the typed field / formatted range. |
| `size`          | `InputSize` | No       | -       | -                                                    |
| `invalid`       | `boolean`   | No       | -       | -                                                    |
| `disabled`      | `boolean`   | No       | -       | -                                                    |
| `className`     | `string`    | No       | -       | -                                                    |
| `'aria-label'`  | `string`    | No       | -       | Accessible label for the date field.                 |
| `calendarLabel` | `string`    | No       | -       | Accessible label for the calendar trigger button.    |

### `<DatePicker.Range>`

| Prop             | Type                                      | Required | Default | Description                                          |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `mode`           | `'range'`                                 | Yes      | -       | -                                                    |
| `value`          | `DateRange \| undefined`                  | No       | -       | Selected range (controlled).                         |
| `onChange`       | `(range: DateRange \| undefined) => void` | No       | -       | -                                                    |
| `presets`        | `readonly DatePickerPreset[]`             | No       | -       | Quick ranges rendered in a rail beside the calendar. |
| `numberOfMonths` | `number`                                  | No       | -       | Months shown side by side (default 2).               |
| `placeholder`    | `string`                                  | No       | -       | Placeholder when no range is selected.               |

### `<DatePicker.Single>`

| Prop       | Type                                | Required | Default | Description                                         |
| ---------- | ----------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `mode`     | `'single'`                          | No       | -       | -                                                   |
| `value`    | `Date \| undefined`                 | No       | -       | Selected date (controlled).                         |
| `onChange` | `(date: Date \| undefined) => void` | No       | -       | -                                                   |
| `presets`  | `readonly DatePickerSinglePreset[]` | No       | -       | Quick dates rendered in a rail beside the calendar. |
